name: recall_password_policy_maps_ia5
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 06.IA/ (CTP-018_password_policy): a script(1) capture of /etc/security/pwquality.conf and the pam_pwhistory line. Password complexity, minimum length, and reuse history is IA-5 (Authenticator Management). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; pwquality parameter names ('minlen', 'dcredit', 'ucredit', 'remember') have near-zero overlap with 'authenticator management' / 'password complexity' NIST prose. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor AC-7 (lockout) present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The information system enforces password complexity by the minimum number of upper case characters, lower case characters, numbers, and special characters used, and enforces minimum password length and reuse restrictions.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Configure password complexity, length, and history requirements.

objectives.text: The information system enforces a limit of consecutive invalid logon attempts.

evidence.title: CTP-018 password policy capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-07 11:00:09-0500
[root@app01 ~]# grep -v '^#' /etc/security/pwquality.conf | grep -v '^$'
minlen = 15
dcredit = -1
ucredit = -1
lcredit = -1
ocredit = -1
difok = 8
maxrepeat = 3
[root@app01 ~]# grep pwhistory /etc/pam.d/system-auth
password    requisite     pam_pwhistory.so use_authtok remember=5 retry=3
[root@app01 ~]# grep PASS_MAX /etc/login.defs
PASS_MAX_DAYS   60
PASS_MIN_DAYS   1
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-07 11:00:58-0500
